title: DrinkVaritea Campaign Experiment
description: Data model for a single paid growth PMF experiment. One record per experiment.

experiment_id.description: Unique ID. Format: EXP-001, EXP-002, etc.

campaign_name.description: Human-readable campaign name. E.g., 'Choice Overload — Reel v1'

pmf_question.description: The exact PMF hypothesis being tested. E.g., 'Do people pay to avoid tea confusion?'

persona.description: Target persona slug from persona library.

pain_point.description: Specific pain point addressed. E.g., 'Too many tea choices, no guidance'

desire.description: What the persona wants to feel or achieve. E.g., 'Confident first tea purchase'

offer.description: Exact offer in the ad. E.g., 'First Sip Box — 3 teas for $19'

keyword_cluster.description: Keywords or audience descriptors. E.g., ['beginner tea box', 'loose leaf tea sampler']

audience.description: Meta audience targeting or Google match type. E.g., 'Interests: tea, wellness, coffee — 25-44 US'

creative_angle.description: The core creative angle. E.g., 'Problem/solution: too many choices, here's the fix'

copy_variant.description: Which copy variant: A, B, C. Reference copy file.

creative_asset_id.description: Asset ID from utm-builder content convention. E.g., 'ig_reel_founder_001'

landing_page.description: Landing page path. E.g., '/' or '/coffee-alternative' or '/gift'

utm_string.description: Full UTM string per utm-builder.md convention.

cta_label.description: CTA text on landing page. E.g., 'Get the First Sip Box'

budget_daily_usd.description: Daily budget in USD. Founder must approve before entry.

budget_total_usd.description: Total campaign budget cap. Founder must approve.

primary_kpi.description: The one metric that determines kill/iterate/scale.

guardrail_metric.description: The metric that triggers an automatic pause regardless of primary KPI. E.g., 'CPC > $TBD founder approval'

kill_rule.description: Exact condition to kill this experiment. E.g., 'After $[X] spend with zero checkout CTA clicks'

scale_rule.description: Exact condition to scale. E.g., 'CTR > [X]% AND at least 1 purchase AND CPC < $[Y]'

decision_rule.description: Decision logic: e.g., 'Review after 3 days or $[X] spend, whichever comes first'

learning.description: What this experiment proved or disproved about PMF.

next_experiment_id.description: The experiment that logically follows from this learning.

github_issue_url.description: Link to GitHub issue tracking this experiment.

notion_log_url.description: Link to Notion experiment log page.
